{"id":"project-LICHEN-2h1i","title":"epic","description":"## Vision
500 LICHEN nodes at major hacker conferences to prove mesh networking works where Meshtastic fails.

## Target Events
- DEFCON (Las Vegas, August)
- HOPE (NYC, July)  
- CCC (Hamburg, December)

## Hardware: T-Echo
- nRF52840 + SX1262 + GPS + E-ink
- Bulk price ~$45-55/unit with battery + case
- 500 units = ~$25,000
- Contact LilyGO directly for bulk pricing

## Budget
| Item | Cost |
|------|------|
| 500 T-Echo @ ~$50 | $25,000 |
| Gateways, flashing jig, SDR | $1,600 |
| Travel/booth (one event) | $3,000 |
| **Total** | **~$30,000** |

## Revenue Model
Sell nodes post-demo at $70-75/unit → $35-37.5k gross → $5-7.5k surplus
Or: grant covers hardware, sales cover travel, surplus funds next event.

## Grant Pitch
"Fund the first real-world stress test of open-source LoRa mesh at scale. 500 nodes, 3 major hacker conferences, all code/results public. Proves mesh networking works where Meshtastic fails. Hardware resale recoups 80%+ of costs."

## Dependencies
- PHY scalability work (TDMA, LR-FHSS, adaptive SF)
- Demo apps
- Bulk flash pipeline","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T23:57:48.025581Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T23:57:48.025581Z"}
